---
title: "Jett Palmer"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile_pic.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jett-palmer/
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf-fill
      text: Resume
      href: jett-palmer-resume.pdf
resources: 
  - jett-palmer-resume.pdf
toc: false
---

## 🎓 \| Education

California Polytechnic State University (Cal Poly) \| San Luis Obispo, CA

M.S. in Statistics \| Jan 2026 - Dec 2026 (Expected)

B.S. in Statistics \| Sept 2022 - Dec 2025

## 🔎 \| Research

Submitted data science pedagogy and behavioral research to the 2026 International Conference on Teaching Statistics with a proceedings paper under review (Theobold, Palmer, et al., 2025).

Presented human behavioral research for the Western Psychological Association (2025) with publication under review ([Epstein, Newland, Palmer, et al., 2025](https://ssrn.com/abstract=5526418)).

Published statistics pedagogy and sampling research in the Journal of Statistics and Data Science Education ([Chance, Kerr, & Palmer, 2024](https://doi.org/10.1080/26939169.2024.2395505)).

## 📊 \| Experience

Principal Investigator \| Advancing the ASCCR Frame with Impact Evaluation \| 2025 - 2026

Data Analyst (Intern) \| American Institute of Behavioral Research & Technology \| 2024 - 2025

Research Assistant \| Authority Constructs in Data Science \| 2023 - 2025

Research Fellow \| User Experience for Social Impact \| 2023 - 2025

Research Assistant \| Statistical Pedagogy \| 2023

## 🎗️ \| Service

Founded two 501(c)(3) nonprofit organizations both with human wellness missions.

Appointed to over fifteen advisory committees and governing bodies at Cal Poly.

Elected to the Board of Directors of Associated Students, Inc. (2023 - 2026) and appointed to facilitate an eight-figure merger.
